name: floating-clock
description: Always-on-top floating desktop clock for macOS — multi-file Objective-C NSPanel with three-segment dashboard (LOCAL · ACTIVE MARKETS · NEXT TO OPEN). 7 bundled profiles (Default / Day Trader / Night Owl / Minimalist / Researcher / Watch Party / Auction Watcher) + 13 Quick Style moods (Brutalist / Zen / Retro CRT / Executive / Neon / Hacker / Glacier / Midnight / Featherlight / Industrial / Trading Floor / Scholar / Samba). 14 major exchanges (NYSE · TSX · B3 · LSE · Euronext · XETRA · SIX · JSE · TSE · HKEX · SSE · KRX · NSE · ASX) covering all populated continents, grouped by region (Americas / Europe / Africa / Asia / Oceania) via iana-prefix detection. Live 5-state session tracking (OPEN · LUNCH · PRE-MARKET · AFTER-HOURS · CLOSED) — amber ◐ dawn + rose ◒ dusk auction signals, gated by SessionSignalWindow (off / 5-60 min, Quick-Style-composable). Rocket-launch T-HH:MM:SS countdown (progressive to T-Nd Hh MMm at ≥24h). Urgency-tiered green/amber/red. Tabulated sections with frosted-glass. Clipboard snapshots with self-documenting UTC-stamped headers via per-segment Copy actions. /floating-clock:diagnose slash command for health reports. Reveal App in Finder + Copy Time/Active/Next menu utilities. Aesthetic surface: 28 color themes · 12 progress-bar glyphs · 8 corner styles · 7 shadow presets · 7 segment-gap presets · 7 font weights (thin → black) · 7 letter-spacing values · 7 line-spacing values · 7 time-separator glyphs · 6 density profiles · 5-phase sun/moon glyph · global + per-segment FontWeight/Transparency · 9 DateFormat locales. **v1.11 headline: full 2026 holiday-awareness across all 14 exchanges**. FCIsMarketHoliday lookup wired into computeSessionState forces CLOSED + blocks PRE-MARKET/AFTER-HOURS promotions on holidays. Next-open countdown correctly chains through back-to-back closures (holiday + weekend + holiday, e.g. LSE Dec 24 after-close → Dec 29 open through Xmas + weekend + Boxing Day observed). Covers Western civic (NYSE MLK/Thanksgiving, LSE Easter+Boxing, TARGET2 shared array for XETRA+Euronext, SIX Berchtold+Ascension+Whit Mon), Lunar (HKEX LNY 3-day + Dragon Boat + Mid-Autumn + Chung Yeung; SSE dual 7-day Golden Weeks; KRX Seollal + Chuseok; Sep 25 is a TRIPLE-market Mid-Autumn coincidence), Substitute-holiday auto-shifts (KRX Korean law + JSE South African law), Multi-religious mix (NSE spans Hindu/Jain/Sikh/Muslim/Christian/Gregorian; TSE 18 Japanese holidays incl. furikae substitute; B3 Carnival 2-day + Corpus Christi; ASX 4-day Easter long weekend). 79 fixtures (15 holiday-specific — all 14 markets + back-to-back chaining). Sub-0.1% idle CPU, ~220 KB signed binary.
